title: 2023年度 第3回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello, this is Sally. Is Andy home?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, he isn't.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「アンディいない」に3の「後でかけ直す」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「友達だよ」→無関係。2「新しい電話」→無関係。3「後でかけ直す」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thank you for doing the report.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Have a nice weekend.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「よい週末を」に1の「月曜に会おう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「月曜に」→正解。2「新しい鉛筆」→無関係。3「動物園に」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. How much is this belt?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Forty dollars.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「40ドル」に2の「じゃあそれにします」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「忘れた」→無関係。2「それにします」→正解。3「友達から」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, look!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What is it, Jenny?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I ate all my vegetables.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「野菜全部食べた」に1の「すごいね」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「すごい」→正解。2「料理しよう」→もう食べた。3「5ドル」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Which train goes to Acton Square?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どの電車？」に1の「ホーム5番のです」が適切。
highlights: Which train goes to Acton Square
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ホーム5番」→正解。2「2ドル50セント」→値段。3「雪の日」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm looking forward to going to the zoo today.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Me, too!

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let's leave now.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「さあ行こう」に2の「まだ準備できてない」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「将来」→無関係。2「準備できてない」→正解。3「怖い」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I lost my keys.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you look in the bedroom?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, and in the kitchen.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Let's look in the living room.
questions.explanation: 「寝室と台所を探した」に2の「リビングを探そう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「夕食準備できる」→鍵探し。2「リビングを探す」→正解。3「すぐ行く」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you ready to go to the party?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, is that a new dress?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. Does it look good?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「似合う？」に1の「はい、似合う」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「似合う」→正解。2「私のだ」→無関係。3「問題ない」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you have plans tonight?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll meet my friend at a café. How about you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll go to a movie.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「映画に行く」に3の「楽しんで」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「急ごう」→別行動。2「そこで会おう」→別行動。3「楽しんで」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What would you like for lunch?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: A sandwich, please.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What kind?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どんな種類？」に1の「ハムチーズ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ハムチーズ」→正解。2「リンゴ」→サンドの種類でない。3「牛乳」→飲み物。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, it's raining.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Here's your umbrella, Lynn.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thanks, but mine is pink. That red one is Mom's.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK.

questions.question: Which umbrella is Lynn's?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「黄色」→ピンク。2「赤」→お母さんの。3「ピンク」→正解。4「青」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can we get some ice cream, Mom?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure. What kind do you want?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Chocolate, please.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. I'll have strawberry.

questions.question: What does the boy want to do?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「アイスを買う」→正解。2「チョコケーキ」→アイスの味。3「公園」→言及なし。4「買い物」→アイス。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I really like your watch. Is it new?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Was it a present?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah, my brother got it in France.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「フランス旅行」→時計。2「時計」→正解。3「新しい電話」→時計。4「誕生日パーティ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm cleaning my room.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can I take this old book?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Go ahead.

questions.question: What does the girl want to do?
highlights: Can I take this old book
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「本をもらう」→正解。2「部屋を掃除」→男の子。3「新しい本を買う」→古い本。4「雑誌を読む」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you finish your report, Max?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. I put it on your desk.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Really? I can't find it.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh no.

questions.question: What is the woman's problem?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「レポートが見つからない」→正解。2「レポートが終わらない」→見つからない。3「鍵をなくした」→言及なし。4「名前忘れた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you want to start a band?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, I'll play the guitar.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll play the piano. When should we practice?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's start on Saturday.

questions.question: What does the boy want to do on Saturday?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ピアノを弾く」→女の子。2「コンサートに行く」→練習。3「ギターを買う」→弾く。4「一緒に練習」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I don't know this word in our textbook. Can I borrow your dictionary?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I don't have one, but you can use my phone.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No problem.

questions.question: What did the boy borrow?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「辞書」→持っていない。2「電話」→正解。3「教科書」→借りてない。4「鉛筆」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm sad. My dog broke his leg.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh no, I'm sorry to hear that.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: He's in the animal hospital.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You should visit him after school.

questions.question: Why is the girl sad?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「犬をなくした」→骨折。2「腕を骨折」→犬の足。3「犬が足を骨折」→正解。4「猫が病気」→犬。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My Spanish lesson is in the library today.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why? It's usually in your classroom.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: There is a club meeting there.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I see.

questions.question: Where is the girl's Spanish lesson today?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「図書館」→正解。2「教室」→いつもは。3「体育館」→言及なし。4「家」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, I'm going to go to my friend's house tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, but I can't drive you. Can you walk there?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll take the bus.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Be careful.

questions.question: How will the boy go to his friend's house?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「車」→運転できない。2「バス」→正解。3「徒歩」→バス。4「自転車」→言及なし。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yesterday was my birthday. My father gave me a rabbit. She's very cute. Her name is Vanilla because she is white.

questions.question: What is the girl talking about?
questions.explanation: 「ウサギをもらった」→新しいペット。
highlights: My father gave me a rabbit
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「誕生日パーティ」→ペット。2「父の仕事」→言及なし。3「新しいペット」→正解。4「好きな食べ物」→バニラは名前。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Eric and Karen like to study together after school. They usually study at Eric's house, but today they studied at the library.

questions.question: Where do Eric and Karen usually study?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校」→エリックの家。2「図書館」→今日だけ。3「カレンの家」→エリックの家。4「エリックの家」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My family and I traveled to Spain this summer. My parents liked the food, and my brother enjoyed the beaches. I liked the warm weather.

questions.question: What did the girl like in Spain?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「食べ物」→両親。2「ビーチ」→兄弟。3「天気」→正解。4「博物館」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Welcome to Bill's Place. Today's special is vegetable pizza. Here's the menu. I'll be back to take your order soon.

questions.question: Where is the man talking?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校」→レストラン。2「レストラン」→正解。3「病院」→レストラン。4「公園」→レストラン。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It was my mother's birthday yesterday. I forgot to buy a present or a card, so I washed the dishes for her after dinner.

questions.question: What did the boy do for his mother?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カードを買った」→忘れた。2「お皿を洗った」→正解。3「夕食を作った」→皿洗い。4「家を掃除」→皿洗い。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Visiting Sydney was fun! We caught fish at the beach, and I rode a horse. My brother went to the zoo to see the baby panda, but I didn't go there.

questions.question: What is the girl talking about?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「旅行」→正解。2「馬」→旅行の一部。3「兄弟のペット」→動物園。4「学校」→旅行。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Shirley will be late for her family's dinner, but she lost her phone. She has a computer, so she'll send her family an e-mail.

questions.question: What is Shirley's problem?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「レストランが見つからない」→電話。2「電話をなくした」→正解。3「パソコンがない」→ある。4「パスワード忘れた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Steven wants to join a school sports team. He wants to play baseball. His best friend plays soccer, and his parents like basketball and tennis.

questions.question: Which sport does Steven want to play?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「野球」→正解。2「サッカー」→友達。3「バスケ」→両親。4「テニス」→両親。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll take my family to the history museum today. My son wants to go to an art festival, but he'll learn more at the museum.

questions.question: Where will the man go with his family today?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「芸術祭」→息子が行きたい。2「歴史博物館」→正解。3「サイエンスセンター」→言及なし。4「公園」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went skiing on Saturday. I had fun in the morning, but I broke my arm in the afternoon. Now, I can't ride my bike or play volleyball for months.

questions.question: What happened on Saturday afternoon?
highlights: I broke my arm in the afternoon
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「腕を骨折」→正解。2「自転車をなくした」→乗れない。3「試合に勝った」→言及なし。4「泳いだ」→スキー。
